div.p: ARCHITECTURAL INVARIANT Equi-depth histograms automatically cluster boundaries in high-density areas, ensuring constant depth per bucket at the cost of variable range widths.

ul.li: Search: Binary search on boundaries O(log B).
Precision: Superior for join cardinality estimation in skewed catalogs.

g.text: Module: Query Optimizer Statistics - Statistics Generation (TDD-M1-05)

div.p: For a range predicate [lo, hi) on column C:

ul.li: If lo <= B_lower AND hi >= B_upper, fraction = 1.0 (Full Bucket).
Else, use Linear Interpolation within the adaptive bucket bounds.
